institution.name: Missouri University of Science and Technology

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Missouri University of Science and Technology rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.1k → $33.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Missouri University of Science and Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Missouri University of Science and Technology are 70% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($83.0k vs $48.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Missouri University of Science and Technology rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (21.6% → 29.0%).
